## AMD Valuation Debate: Rich on Cash Flow Metrics, Cheap on a Sales Basis

The cash flow vs. sales multiple divergence on AMD is worth flagging if the market rotates from growth to profitability frameworks — a re-rating in either direction could be significant given AMD's AI GPU exposure and investor positioning.

- Headline presents a split valuation read — AMD appears expensive on a cash flow basis but inexpensive on a revenue/sales multiple
- No specific multiples, price targets, or fundamental data are cited
- Low classifier confidence; commentary or opinion piece with no new catalyst
- Framing is explicitly ambiguous, neither a buy nor a sell signal
